sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11646" key="a)paulisth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαυλ-ιστήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπαύλια, ἀ. χλανίς</foreign> a garment <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">presented on this day,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
